item.title: Single vs. Dual-Chamber ICDs: The Architectural Dilemma
item.description: An analysis of the clinical indications for dual-chamber ICDs versus the mechanical advantages of single-chamber systems in electrophysiology.

item.title: Matching Pacemaker Modes to Patient Clinical Profiles
item.description: Selecting the correct pacing mode is crucial to avoid pacemaker syndrome and maximize cardiac output. This guide breaks down the clinical indications for VVI, DDD, and other common modes.

item.title: Pacemaker Manufacturer Timing Systems: A Clinical Comparison
item.description: Understanding how different cardiac device manufacturers handle pacing timing is crucial for optimal device programming. We compare atrial-based vs. ventricular-based timing behaviors across major pacemaker manufacturers.
